title: Intel's stock soars 20% as results top estimates, with chipmaker showing signs of growth
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Intel's stock soared 20% after hours following a strong first-quarter report that exceeded Wall Street's expectations, with earnings of 29 cents per share. Reve
excerpt: Intel's stock soared 20% after hours following a strong first-quarter report that exceeded Wall Street's expectations, with earnings of 29 cents per share. Revenue rose more than 7%, indicating signs of growth for the chipmaker.

content.introduction: Intel's stock soared 20% after hours following a strong first-quarter report that exceeded Wall Street's expectations, with earnings of 29 cents per share. Revenue rose more than 7%, indicating signs of growth for the chipmaker.
body: Intel's stock surged 20% in after-hours trading following a strong first-quarter earnings report that exceeded Wall Street expectations.
- Revenue rose more than 7%, a sign that the chipmaker is finally starting to see some growth. - The stock has been a Wall Street darling of
